name: Project Sync
description: Regular project synchronization meeting for tracking progress, risks, and milestones.

sections.title: Summary
sections.instruction: One-paragraph overview of project status and key takeaways.

sections.title: Progress Update
sections.instruction: What was accomplished since last sync. Include milestone progress.

sections.title: Risks & Issues
sections.instruction: Current risks, their severity, and mitigation plans.

sections.title: Next Steps
sections.instruction: Key actions before the next sync, with owners.
